message:
🐛 Fix Fleet Compliance Heatmap blank state and install CTA text (#2115)

- FleetComplianceHeatmap: use useClusters() as fallback for cluster names
  so the grid is populated even before compliance hooks finish scanning.
  Previously showed "No clusters available" when MCP bridge was unavailable.
- FleetComplianceHeatmap: add useDemoMode() for correct isDemoData wiring.
- Update "Install with AI →" to "Install with an AI Mission →" in
  ComplianceCards, KyvernoPolicies, and OPAPolicies cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,7 +128,7 @@ Please proceed step by step.`,

Install Trivy Operator for vulnerability scanning.{' '}

@@ -226,7 +226,7 @@ Please proceed step by step.`,

Install Kubescape for security posture management.{' '}

@@ -139,7 +139,7 @@ Please proceed step by step.`,

Install Kyverno for Kubernetes-native policy management.{' '}
